zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Percy於1364年5月20日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，他的父親Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland22歲，母親Margaret Neville25歲。他於1379年12月10日與Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1388年登記服兵役。他於1400年在英國被列為he held the office of justiciar of cheshire.。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年39歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克約克 明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Percy于1364年5月20日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，他的父亲Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland22岁，母亲Margaret Neville25岁。他于1379年12月10日与Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1388年登记服兵役。他于1400年在英国被列为he held the office of justiciar of cheshire.。他去世于1403年7月21日在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年39岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克約克 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Percy was born on 20 May 1364, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, his father, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Neville, was 25. He married Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys on 10 December 1379, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1388. In 1400, his occupation is listed as he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. in England. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Percy est né le 20 mai 1364, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Neville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys le 10 décembre 1379, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1388. En 1400, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à York Minster, York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Percy am 20. Mai 1364 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Neville 25. Er hat am 10. Dezember 1379 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1388 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1400 ist sein Beruf als he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Percy è nato il il 20 maggio 1364 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Neville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys il 10 dicembre 1379, nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1388. Nel 1400, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. nel England. Morì il 21 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Percyが1364年5月20日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberlandは22歳，母Margaret Nevilleは25歳であった。1379年12月10日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクでElizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年に兵役登録をした。1400年，イギリスでの職業はhe held the office of justiciar of cheshire.と記録されている。彼は1403年7月21日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで39歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークヨーク ミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Percy(이)가 1364년 5월 20일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Neville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1379년 12월 10일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1400년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 he held the office of justiciar of cheshire.이었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.St George Chapel, Windsor Castle, Berksh: Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Percy nasceu em 20 de maio de 1364, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Neville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys em 10 de dezembro de 1379, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1388. Em 1400, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Percy родился 20 мая 1364 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Neville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys 10 декабря 1379 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1388 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1400 годуработал по профессии he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. в местности Англия. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Percy nació el 20 de mayo de 1364, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Neville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys el 10 de diciembre de 1379, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1388. En 1400, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of justiciar of cheshire. en Inglaterra. Murió el 21 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
